description: A science observing run requires data reduction, but the dome closed before flat fields could be acquired! Capture 5 flat frames (V-band, Slot 2) to /home/ga/Data/raw_flats/. Write a Python script at ~/reduce.py to calibrate 3 raw science images from /home/ga/Data/raw_lights/ using the captured flats and existing darks in /home/ga/Data/raw_darks/. The script must create a master dark and master flat using medians, calculate a normalized flat (master_flat divided by its mean), and apply the calibration formula: (raw_light - master_dark) / norm_flat. Save the three calibrated arrays as float32 FITS files in /home/ga/Data/calibrated/ named exactly calibrated_1.fits, calibrated_2.fits, and calibrated_3.fits.
